title: serjania glabriuscula
intro: Serjania glabriuscula, also known as the small-fruited serjania or small-fruited Serjania, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to South America. The plant's leaves and fruits have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Serjania glabriuscula include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
